titleStmt.title: SII 38.176: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 176. (A.R. No. 176 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the eighteenth slab built into the floor, verandah, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Maduraikoṇḍa Parakēsarivarman (Parāntaka I) Year 24: 931 A.D.

summary.p: Beginning damaged. This inscription could be that of Parāntaka I. It records a gift of thirty kaḻañju of gold weighed by the touchstone of ūr, by Sembiyaṉ Mūvēndavēḷaṉ alias Sāttaṉulagaṉ of Vaṇḍāḻañjēri of Naṟaiyūr-nāḍu, for burning a perpetual lamp to the god Mahādēva of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr. The ūrār of Kuḻumaṇippākkam in Maṅgāḍu in Puliyūr-kōṭṭam received the gift and agreed to remit interest 1 kaḻañju and 1/4 poṉ every six months at the rate of 3 mañjāḍi per kaḻañju. The ūrār also agreed to feed twice daily to those person who came to collect the interest amount for the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭakopparakecariva
Irupattu nālāvatu
tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu vaṇṭāḻañceri
vaṇṭāḻañceriyuṭaiyāṉ cempi
yaṉmuventaveḷāṉākiya cāttaṉu
lakaṉ tiruvoṟṟiyūr mahādevarkku
Oru nandāviḷakkkerippataṟku vait
ta poṉ Ūrkkaṟcemmai mu
kaḻañcu Ippoṉ koṇṭu kaṭa
vom puliyūrkoṭṭattu māṅkā
ṭṭukkuḻamaṇipākkattūromip
poṉṉālāṇṭu varai kaḻañciṉvā
y muṉṟu mañcāṭip palicaiyāli
ṇṭāṉi tiṅkaḷ mutalāṟāṟu
kaḷiliru kaḻañce kāṟceytu po
tu ntiruviḷakkiṉukkā candrātārāmu nilai
ppoliyūṭṭākat tiruvoṟṟiyūrāṇi
kiḻe koṇṭu ceṉṟiṭṭukkuṭuppomā
ṉo mippoliyūṭṭup poṉṟaṇṭa
vantārkku nicati yiraṇṭu coṟu kuṭup
pomāṉo mitaniṟṟampiluRead mitaṟṟiṟampiṇṭikai
yum paṭṭikaiyuṅ kāṭṭāte dharmmāsa
nattu nicati Eṭṭaraikāṇan taṇṭap
paṭuvomāṉo miṭṭa kāṇañ ceṉṟu
m puḷḷi kuttuvikkap peṟā
tomaṉo mittaṇṭappaṭṭum po
liyūṭṭup poṉ muṭṭāmaic celu
ttuvomāṉom kuḻamaṇipākka
ttūrom § .
Digital edition of SII 38.176 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
